Detailed joinery services

Joinery services we cover

Everything from fitted furniture and staircases to structural carpentry and commercial fit-outs. Use the sections below to find the service you need, or see the joinery overview for a shorter summary.

Get a quote Call 07939 551481
Included here

Seven service areas we cover

  • Bespoke fitted furniture
  • Staircases
  • First and second fix carpentry
  • Structural timber framing
  • Outdoor joinery
  • Fencing and gates
  • Commercial joinery
Fitted furniture Staircases First & second fix Timber framing Outdoor joinery Fencing & gates Commercial joinery

Bespoke fitted furniture

Made to suit the room, not forced into it

We design and fit wardrobes, shelving, alcove units, media walls and home office furniture around the shape of the property. That is particularly valuable in period homes, extensions and loft spaces where off-the-shelf joinery often wastes space.

Every project is measured carefully and finished to suit the interior, whether that means painted, lacquered or natural timber surfaces.

  • Fitted wardrobes and bedroom storage
  • Alcove units, shelving and display joinery
  • Home office furniture and desk systems
  • Media walls and built-in living space storage
In practice

Fitted storage that makes the most of the space

Good for awkward rooms, alcoves and period houses where off-the-shelf furniture just does not work.

In practice

New stairs or a refresh of what you have already

Whether you want a full new staircase or just updated handrails and spindles, we can sort it.

Staircases

Staircase installations and refurbishments

We install new staircase systems and refurbish existing flights, including balustrades, handrails, trims and finishing details. The aim is always a staircase that feels solid, in proportion to the house and finished properly for the space.

We work in oak, pine or painted finishes to suit both traditional and more contemporary interiors.

  • New staircase installations
  • Refurbishments and re-finishing
  • Oak, pine and painted solutions
  • Balustrade and handrail work

First and second fix carpentry

First and second fix carpentry for renovations and extensions

We carry out framing and structural work at first fix stage, then return for second fix elements such as architraves, skirting, internal doors, linings and flooring.

This side of the division is especially useful for contractors, developers and homeowners managing extensions, refurbishments and staged building works.

  • Door frames, linings and internal finishing
  • Skirting, architraves and trims
  • Flooring installation
  • Carpentry packages for extensions and renovations
In practice

The carpentry side of your renovation or extension

We fit in with other trades and keep things moving so the project does not stall.

In practice

Structural timber work for conversions and extensions

If you have drawings or an engineer's spec, we work to them. If not, we can help you work out the next step.

Structural timber framing

Stud walls, framing and structural timber work

We construct stud partition walls, framed elements and timber structures for extensions, loft conversions, garage conversions and commercial projects.

Where drawings or engineering information are provided, we work to them. If it is not yet clear what is needed, we help you pin down the right next step before work starts.

  • Stud partition walls and internal framing
  • Timber frame extension work
  • Loft and garage conversion carpentry
  • Commercial structural carpentry support

Outdoor joinery

Outdoor timber work built to handle the elements

We take on selected outdoor joinery such as pergolas, timber screens and exterior timber features where the job needs to be measured right and finished cleanly.

This suits domestic projects where the outside of the property needs the same standard of fitting and detailing as the work inside it.

  • Pergolas and simple timber structures
  • Timber screens and privacy features
  • External storage and utility joinery
  • Weather-aware fixing and finishing
In practice

Outdoor timber features that last

Pergolas, screens and external joinery built to handle the weather and still look good.

In practice

Fencing and gates that are built to last

Side gates, boundary panels and full fence runs — measured and fitted right for your garden.

Fencing and gates

Fencing and gates supplied and fitted

We supply and install timber fencing, boundary panels and side gates, with an eye on durability, privacy and overall finish.

Whether it is a full run of fencing or a straightforward gate replacement, the work is measured on site and fitted to suit rather than forced in.

  • Timber fencing and boundary panels
  • Side gates and framed gate sets
  • Posts, rails and treated timber installation
  • Practical advice on layout, privacy and finish
In practice

Joinery for shops, offices and commercial spaces

We are used to working around other trades, trading hours and tight deadlines.

Commercial joinery

Joinery for commercial and business premises

We take on commercial joinery projects including fit-outs, shopfront interiors, partitions, furniture and site carpentry. The approach is shaped around commercial timescales and the realities of working around other trades or occupied premises.

Where required, we can phase work to reduce disruption and keep the space usable throughout.

  • Retail and shop fit-out joinery
  • Office partitions and fitted work
  • Bar and hospitality joinery
  • Commercial site carpentry support

Next step

Need advice on a joinery job?

Tell us what you need and we will advise on the best way to tackle it.

Get a quote Call 07939 551481
Marlborough Builders Joinery and roofing specialists

Family-run building company based in Prescot, delivering joinery and roofing work across Merseyside and the wider Northwest.
